text_original: Just installed this app and chatting until times out. When the waiting time is done, it back counting 24 hours again... its like i waiting the countdown forever...
text_zh: 刚装了这软件，聊到次数限制了。等计时结束，它居然又重新开始24小时倒计时……感觉我得永远这么等下去了。
reply_original: Hi! We are deeply sorry for the frustrating experience with the chat timer, and we want to fix this for you immediately. Please email your UID (found in Settings) to support@fantachat.ai so our technical team can investigate your account. We will do our best to get you back to chatting without the endless countdown!
reply_zh:
你好！对于聊天计时器带来的挫败体验，我深表歉意。这听起来像是一个同步错误，我们希望立即为您修复。

请将您的 UID（在设置中查看）发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的技术团队对您的账号进行调查。我们会尽最大努力让您恢复聊天，不再受无休止倒计时的困扰！
reply_original_before_override:
Hi there! I am truly sorry for the frustrating experience with the chat timer. This sounds like a sync error and we want to fix it for you immediately.

Please email your UID (found in Settings) to support@fantachat.ai so our tech team can investigate your account. We'll do our best to get you back to chatting without the endless countdown!
override_input: 你好！对于聊天计时器带来的挫败体验，我们深表歉意，我们希望立即为您修复。  请将您的 UID（在设置中查看）发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们的技术团队对您的账号进行调查。我们会尽最大努力让您恢复聊天，不再受无休止倒计时的困扰！
